title: Strategy Pattern for Multi Country Support in Automation
description: How to use the strategy pattern to handle country-specific logic in test automation frameworks without branching chaos.

title: Authenticated State in Automation
description: Approaches for managing authenticated state efficiently in automated test suites — from session reuse to token injection.

title: Stabilizing Automation Tests with Network Beacons
description: Using network beacons as synchronization points to eliminate flakiness caused by timing and race conditions in automated tests.
